description_long: This is a standard claw hammer featuring a metallic head and a two-tone handle. The head is made of steel, with one side forming a flat striking face and the other side curving into a split claw for nail removal. The handle is primarily yellow, likely wood or fiberglass, with a black rubberized grip at the end for improved handling and comfort. The hammer shows a smooth transition between the head and handle, with the grip section textured for slip resistance. The overall design is ergonomic, suitable for both professional and household use, and the hammer appears to be in good condition with no visible damage or excessive wear.
description: A claw hammer with a steel head, yellow handle, and black rubberized grip, designed for striking and nail removal.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from an angled top view, highlighting the curvature of the claw and the transition from the head to the handle.
description_view_1: A clear side profile shows the full length of the hammer, the flat striking face, and the split claw, as well as the yellow handle and black grip.
description_view_2: The hammer is viewed from the back, emphasizing the handle's length, the black grip, and the rear of the head with the claw visible.
description_view_3: An angled view from the opposite side, showing the underside of the head, the claw, and the ergonomic handle with its grip.
attribute_handle_type: Straight handle with a yellow shaft, likely wood or fiberglass, and a black rubberized ergonomic grip with visible texturing for slip resistance.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head made of steel, featuring a flat striking face on one side and a curved, split claw on the other for nail removal.
